identity.mission: Create a 'Clarity Campus' - a modern, minimalist educational platform that feels human, not corporate. Prioritize whitespace, readability, and distinct visual hierarchy.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix 'Swiss Print Design' (grids, big type) with 'SaaS Utility' (clean interactive states).
Emotion First: Education is empowerment. The site should feel 'Encouraging' and 'Clear', not 'Strict'.
Content is King: The course content (video/text) is the hero. The UI is the frame.
Negative Space: Use 2x more padding than usual. Let the content breathe.
Contrast: High contrast for text (accessibility) and bold colors for actions.

visual_identity.theme_strategy: Light Mode Default (Education Focus) with 'Soft Dark' capability for coding courses.

primary.usage: Primary Buttons, Active States, Brand Accents

secondary.usage: Success messages, Course Completion, Positive Indicators

hero.layout: Centered Layout (Swiss Style). Big bold headline, subheadline, clear CTA.
hero.visuals: Abstract 3D shape or high-quality diverse student image on the right (desktop) or top (mobile).

elements: Instruction Step 1: Scan QR or Copy Code

footer.content: Copyright, Contact Info (Phone, Email), Social Links.

sections: Hero Section: Value Prop + 'Start Learning' CTA + Translation Button (Top)
Course Catalog: Filterable Grid (Tech vs Language)

course_detail_page.right_col: Lesson List (Scrollable), Progress Bar, 'Next Lesson' CTA

image_queries: diverse college students studying laptop modern library
programmer coding python screen dark mode close up
assets.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for UI icons (User, Book, Play, Check, Globe, Upload).

instructions_to_main_agent.general: Follow the 'E1' persona. Be bold with whitespace. Don't clutter. Use the 'Violet' primary color sparingly for impact.
instructions_to_main_agent.i18n: Implement a simple Context-based i18n system. Create a `translations.js` file with keys for all 5 languages. Default to 'pt'.
instructions_to_main_agent.auth: Mock the auth flow if backend isn't ready, but UI must show distinct 'Logged In' vs 'Guest' states.
instructions_to_main_agent.payment: The PIX code is provided in the prompt. Hardcode it for now. Ensure the receipt upload UI feels functional (even if it just mocks the upload).
instructions_to_main_agent.content: Use the contact info: '11970561970' and 'jeanmaryjeanlus29@gmail.com'. Link the 'More Info' button to 'https://jeanmaryshalomboot.streamlit.app'.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: `transition: all`. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add `.App { text-align: center; }` in the css file.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...).
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...}).
